A_RETRIEVAL.description: Correct concept retrieved, wrong specific fact

subcategories.A1_entity_substitution: Wrong real entity of the same semantic type (e.g., wrong battle, wrong person, wrong chemical)
subcategories.A2_temporal_misattribution: Right event or entity, wrong date/year/time period
subcategories.A3_geographic_misattribution: Right event or entity, wrong place/location
subcategories.A4_numerical_distortion: Right entity, wrong number (magnitude off by >15%)

subcategories.B1_causal_inversion: Reverses cause and effect or gets the direction of a relationship wrong
subcategories.B2_scope_overgeneralization: Applies a specific fact too broadly or conflates related but distinct concepts

subcategories.C1_entity_fabrication: Invents a nonexistent entity (person, organization, place, law, paper)
subcategories.C2_citation_fabrication: Invents a paper, statistic, study, or source that doesn't exist
subcategories.C3_detail_confabulation: Fabricates specific details about a real topic (fake article count, fake ruling structure)
subcategories.C4_false_precision: Adds fabricated numbers, dates, or statistics to increase apparent credibility

D_METACOGNITIVE.description: Wrong relationship to own knowledge state

subcategories.D1_denial_deflection: Claims the asked-about fact doesn't exist or isn't relevant when it does
subcategories.D2_overconfident_assertion: States highly uncertain claim with false certainty and no hedging

E_AMPLIFICATION.description: Kernel of truth distorted through elaboration

subcategories.E1_partial_truth_inflated: Correct starting point but wrong elaboration or conclusion
subcategories.E2_analogical_overshoot: Applies pattern from a similar domain incorrectly

F_FORMAT.description: Response structure issues rather than factual errors

subcategories.F1_incomplete_response: Correct start but cuts off before answering the question
subcategories.F2_irrelevant_response: Responds to a different question than asked
